PageviewUrlLookup.PluginDescription: Search pageview counts for a specific URL directly from visit logs, and save each lookup as a backend report row.
PageviewUrlLookup.Intro: Search exact pageviews for a URL in a chosen period/date and store each result in a saved backend report table.
PageviewUrlLookup.UrlQueryHelp: For exact mode, use a tracked page URL value (protocol is optional). For contains mode, enter part of the URL/path.
PageviewUrlLookup.ErrorUrlRequired: Please enter a URL to search.
PageviewUrlLookup.ErrorUrlTooLong: The URL must not exceed 2048 characters.
PageviewUrlLookup.ErrorInvalidDate: Please select valid start and end dates (YYYY-MM-DD).
PageviewUrlLookup.ErrorInvalidDateRange: Start date must be before or equal to end date.
PageviewUrlLookup.ErrorGeneric: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
PageviewUrlLookup.NoSavedRows: No saved lookup rows yet for this website.
